title: Japanese Encephalitis Virus Isolation
author: Wenjing Liu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdaui2ew

steps.instruction: The filtered sterile mosquito grinding solution was inoculated into 24-well plates grown to 80% monolayer Vero cells, 70 μl of each well was added for virus isolation, and a 3-well blank control was set for each plate.(for CSF samples 100μl of each well was added for virus isolation).
1 ml of MEM medium containing 2% FBS was added to each well for maintenance of growth. Cultivate at 37℃ 5% CO2 and observe under microscope every day whether cytopathic effect (CPE) occurs.
Specimens with no CPE were used for blind transmission for three generations .
